parts.text:
You are a client success manager. Write a professional and warm welcome email in HTML format for a new client.

Client Name: {{Client}}{{Name}}{{from}}{{Airtable}}
Company: {{Company}}{{from}}{{Airtable}}
Service Type: {{Service}}{{Type}}{{from}}{{Airtable}}
Assigned To: {{Assigned}}{{To}}{{from}}{{Airtable}}

Requirements:
- Address the client by their first name
- Mention the specific service they signed up for
- Mention their assigned team member by name
- Include next steps: kickoff call within 24 hours, project workspace access coming soon
- Warm and professional tone
- Primary color teal (#008080) for headings
- Sign off as "The Onboarding Team"
- Return only the HTML email body, nothing else

spec.help: You can use public or signed URLs as input by using the URLs.
